page: Pressure Sensitive Labels for Chemical & Lubricant Products

sections.title: Chemical And Lubricant Labels
sections.content: JK Labels caters to several leading lubricant /chemical companies in India and Africa for their container labels. All the printed labels are manufactured using latest printing technologies and most sophisticated label stocks. We are manufacturing stickers and labels in Mumbai since 1980. Chemical and Lubricant labels are used for enlisting the contents of containers, barrels and drums. Chemical & Lubricants transportation requires specialized pressure sensitive labels, which we provide. We are one of the few label printers in India who note the conditions which your labels are going to go through and depending on that give you the adhesion level and face stock so that the chemical labels for bottles can resist the toughest of conditions. With our German printing techniques (flexographic), we ensure your product gets the fitting printed label. Our bottle labels can withstand wear and tear and various environmental circumstances. We use extremely strong gumming and face material for weather resistant and chemical proof self adhesive labels which are suitable for a wide variety of surfaces. The shelf life of these products is several years. These sticker labels are manufactured to meet customer specifications and requirements. We have been manufacturing chemical and lubricant labels for several companies like :-

features: Metallic finishes on the printed labels
Cold foiling of the bottle labels
UV varnished Roll form sticker labels
PP labels , PVC labels , PE labels and PET labels
